impact: This advances the PP&D plan by adding deterministic guardrail validation for another permit workflow without live crawl, DevHub login, uploads, payments, or private artifacts.
summary: Add fixture-only Urban Forestry guardrail compiler coverage for missing facts, document groups, payment, corrections, inspections, and finalization stops.
target_task: Task checkbox-108: Add guardrail compiler fixture tests for the Urban Forestry permit workflow covering missing facts, required document groups, payment stop points, correction-upload stop points, and any inspection/finalization stop points, using only fixture data.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
